arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Moises Caicedo makes transfer demand amid defensive woes
arts.sum: Moises Caicedo has reportedly urged Chelsea to complete a deal for Club Brugge defender Joel Ordonez this summer. The Chelsea midfielder reportedly believes that Ordonez would excel in the Premier League and he is encouraging his current club to seriously consider a move this summer.

arts.sum: That said, none of the above is connected or linked to Manchester City's clash with the Premier League over alleged breaches of financial rules . The Premier League have suffered a major setback after an independent panel deemed its sponsorship rules 'null and void'.
